response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including C++ in a commercial environment (National Instruments) and geospatial projects (GISCollective). However, his primary expertise lies in JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang, with limited recent exposure to modern C++ or Rust for routing/tiling pipelines. His geospatial work is promising but lacks clear evidence of handling large-scale routing data or high-performance distributed systems for navigation systems.
strengths: Strong C++ background from National Instruments, suitable for low-level systems work
Experience with geospatial data processing (GISCollective, Green Map Association)
Demonstrated ability to learn new technologies and adapt across full technical stacks
concerns: Limited recent experience with modern C++ or Rust for routing/tiling pipelines
Primary expertise in JavaScript/Node.js may not align well with performance-critical requirements
Geospatial experience is more focused on mapping than on routing optimization or traffic integration
